subject: docs(claude): sync CLAUDE.md with upstream glow-props template
body:
Fetched latest changes from devmade-ai/glow-props upstream CLAUDE.md.

Changes from upstream:
- Added Triggers section (review, audit, docs, mobile, clean, performance, security, debug, improve, start)
- Added new AI Notes: TutorialModal.jsx maintenance, sibling repo access via GitHub API
- Added new prohibition: no interactive input prompts
- Added Download as PDF suggested implementation (window.print)
- Updated App Icons section with 400 DPI rasterization and shape-rendering
- Added Expo config note for app.json icon paths
- Cleaned up reminder phrasing throughout

Tags: documentation, upstream-sync
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: documentation
Semver: patch
